content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch delta against 2655e46f850a0852fe5ae858de06d92a9a133918. I found one fix-now final-review contract/docs mismatch and did not identify additional branch regressions in the touched code paths. `cargo` was not available in this shell, and `nix build` did not complete during the review window.

## Amendments

1. finding_summary: [docs/templates.md:60-62] now says `final_review_arbiter` receives the same merged amendment list that `final_review_voter` sees, but the runtime contract built in [src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:2075-2117] passes only `disputed_amendments` plus `reviewer_votes` to the arbiter template.
affected_files: docs/templates.md, src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs
remediation_hint: Update the template docs to say the arbiter receives only disputed amendments plus `reviewer_votes`, not the full merged amendment list.
   Rationale: This is a real contract mismatch in the newly added documentation. Anyone authoring a custom `final_review_arbiter` template from these docs can target the wrong payload shape and make incorrect arbitration assumptions.
